NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALFOF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CALIFORNIA DRYWALL/LATHING INDUSTRY LABOR-MANAGEMENT COOPERATION COMMITTEE, INC. LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
